author: y4rr
content:
Filed while closing #384. The IntermediateFeatures trait was added in ferrotorch-vision/src/models/feature_extractor.rs along with an impl for ResNet (stages: stem, layer1, layer2, layer3, layer4, avgpool, fc). The remaining vision models still need their own impls before FeatureExtractor can wrap them:

- VGG (vgg11, vgg16) — natural stages are conv blocks 1-5 + classifier
- ViT (vit_b_16) — patch_embed, transformer_blocks (per-block output), pre_logits, head
- EfficientNet (efficientnet_b0) — stem, MBConv blocks per stage, head_conv, classifier
- ConvNeXt (convnext_tiny) — stem, stages 1-4, head
- Swin Transformer (swin_tiny) — stages 1-4 (each contains multiple blocks)
- U-Net (unet) — encoder1-4, bottleneck, decoder1-4 (FCN/segmentation use case is the most natural for FE here)
- YOLO — backbone stages

Pattern from the ResNet impl in ferrotorch-vision/src/models/resnet.rs (around line 590):
1. impl IntermediateFeatures<T> for {Model}<T>
2. forward_features iterates the architecture's forward path stage by stage and inserts each output into a HashMap with a stable string key
3. feature_node_names returns the canonical name list

Each impl is mechanical (~30-40 lines) once the stage names are decided. Group them by file to avoid touching too many files in a single commit.
